title: Seeking good OLED display to use with MeshCore

messages.author: josiah_wi
messages.text: Hi all, My capstone project team is looking for an OLED display that we can use for a handheld companion radio. The display we planned to use is on backorder and may not arrive in time, since we are nearing the end of the semester. Please share if you know good displays to recommend! Thank you, Josiah VanderZee
messages.content_html: Hi all, My capstone project team is looking for an OLED display that we can use for a handheld companion radio. The display we planned to use is on backorder and may not arrive in time, since we are nearing the end of the semester. Please share if you know good displays to recommend! Thank you, Josiah VanderZee

messages.author: NoahK
messages.text: There are plenty of 0.96" 128x64 pixel OLEDs that just connect to i2c. Or are you looking for a large color screen? OLED encompasses everything from <10mm to >85 inches (edited)
messages.content_html: There are plenty of 0.96" 128x64 pixel OLEDs that just connect to i2c. Or are you looking for a large color screen? OLED encompasses everything from <10mm to >85 inches (edited)
messages.reply_html:
josiah_wi
Hi all, My capstone project team is looking for an OLED display that we can use for a handheld companion radio. The display we planned to use is on backorder and may not arrive in time, since we are nearing the end of the semester. Please share if you know good displays to recommend! Thank you, Josiah VanderZee

messages.author: josiah_wi
messages.text: I don’t think we need a color screen.
messages.content_html: I don’t think we need a color screen.

messages.author: NoahK
messages.text: Meshcore supports any resolution. You'd just have to set the _w and _h in the DisplayDriver on your board
messages.content_html: Meshcore supports any resolution. You'd just have to set the _w and _h in the DisplayDriver on your board
messages.reactions_html:
1
1
messages.reply_html:
josiah_wi
We are considering a 240x360 display, but I’m not sure if MeshCore supports that resolution. (edited)

messages.author: josiah_wi
messages.content_html: Good to know. Thank you!
